title: GrandisCraft
description: A vanilla+ modpack with an exclusive focus on multiplayer
body:
![Logo2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f3ccec867fbf8d25e12fad2adab9c1a0cd51f92.png)

## A vanilla+ experience that doesn't alter the core gameplay ### Mod hightlights: - Simple Voice Chat - Iris Shaders - Mouse tweaks - Emotecraft - Distant horizons - Litematica - Sodium + Lithium - Jade - Roughly Enough Items - Sound Physics Remastered - General server mods for a better experience - Easy Magic & Easy Anvil All of these mods have perfect support on the server and will make the vanilla experience feel incredibly smuud ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XrzIcyYQ/images/0968ca2fd2c7c5756e1890af4af8b578a36404e1.png) ---- ### Server includes: - Modified QOL recipes - Performance mods - Distant Horizons - Essentials Commands - Right click harvest - Veinminer and Timber datapacks (Works only with netherite tools)
To be added - Dynmap - More modified recipes - Possibly Immersive Portals - More versions of wooden blocks (Crafting table, chest, bookshelves...)
